title: iberis ciliata var. carnosa
intro: Iberis ciliata var. carnosa, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic characteristics. The health benefits of Iberis ciliata var. carnosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. It is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
